passing_score_scale: Scaled score or percentage depending on certifying body

testing_centers.notes: CMA (AAMA) and CCMA (NHA) administered at Pearson VUE test centers. Schedule at home.pearsonvue.com. Government-issued photo ID required.
RMA (AMT) and NCMA (NCCT) may be administered at PSI test centers. Check with individual certifying body for current testing vendor.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly. Secondary ID (credit card, school ID) may be required by some vendors.
exam_rules: Closed book; no reference materials or calculators permitted. Medical terminology reference not permitted during exam. Candidate must present valid government-issued photo ID at check-in. Personal items must be stored during the exam.
renewal_options: CMA (AAMA): Valid for 5 years; renewal requires 60 continuing education units (CEUs) or retaking the exam. RMA (AMT): Annual renewal with CE requirements set by AMT. NCMA (NCCT): Annual renewal with CE requirements. CCMA (NHA): 2-year renewal with 10 CE hours required.

prerequisites.description: Graduate of a CAAHEP- or ABHES-accredited medical assisting program required

retake_policy.notes: CMA (AAMA): 60-day waiting period between failed attempts; maximum 3 attempts within a 12-month eligibility window. RMA (AMT): Retake policies set by AMT; contact AMT for current policy. NCMA (NCCT): 30-day waiting period. CCMA (NHA): 30-day waiting period between attempts.

official_study_resources.title: CMA (AAMA) Exam Content Outline
official_study_resources.notes: Free content outline and study resources available at aama-ntl.org

official_study_resources.title: AAMA Practice Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice questions available through the AAMA study portal
